settings.heading: Free Plants: The Affordable Organic Store
How to Get a Free Plant?

settings.description:
Here you have a chance to get a free plant from The Affordable Organic Store. It’s simple! We’re thrilled to offer you the chance to receive a beautiful, eco-friendly plant for free with your purchase. This special offer is our way of giving back to both nature and our cherished customers. Just make a qualifying purchase at our store, and you’ll be eligible to choose a complimentary plant from our selection. Whether you’re a seasoned gardener or new to the world of plants, our giveaways are designed to help you enhance your home’s greenery effortlessly.

Our commitment to sustainability shines through in this initiative. By giving away these plants, we aim to support eco-friendly practices and encourage more people to incorporate greenery into their lives. Each plant is carefully chosen to thrive in a variety of environments, making it an ideal addition to any home. Don’t miss this opportunity to expand your green space while contributing to a healthier planet. Visit The Affordable Organic Store today, take advantage of our offer, and join us in making a positive environmental impact!

settings.subheading: Share about our website on your WhatsApp status and get a free plant with your next order.
settings.heading: Get a free Plant!!!
settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Share our Website on your WhatsApp Status.
  2. Take a screenshot of the status with 150 viewers and email info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive a coupon code for purchasing a free plant in your email within 24 hours.
  4. Use the coupon at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
  5. This coupon can not be clubbed with any other coupon.

settings.subheading: Share us on Facebook to get a free plant with your next order
settings.heading: Get a plant for free with your next order!!!
settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Share our Facebook page on your personal Facebook profile.
  2. Take a screenshot of the post and email info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive a coupon code for the free plant in your email within 24 hours.
  4. Use the coupon at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
  5. This coupon can not be clubbed with any other coupon.

settings.subheading: Make an unboxing video of our products and get a chance to win a free plant with your next order.
settings.heading: Get a chance to win a plant for free!!
settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Make an unboxing video of our products and share it on YouTube.
  2. Send the video link via email to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive a coupon code for the free plant in your email within 24 hours.
  4. Use the coupon at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
  5. This coupon can not be clubbed with any other coupon.

settings.subheading: Write a blog and get a free plant with your next order.
settings.heading: Get a plant free
settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Write a blog about gardening and include a link to www.theaffordableorganicstore.com in the blog.
  2. Send the blog link via email to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive a coupon code for the free plant in your email once our team approves the blog.
  4. Submit a plagiarism-free blog post, written by someone with prior experience in the field. The content should meet a minimum standard of quality and relevance to sustainability, organic living, or gardening.
  5. Use the coupon at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
  6. This coupon can not be clubbed with any other coupon.

settings.subheading: Make an Instagram reel with our products to get a free plant with your next order.
settings.heading: Get a plant for free!
settings.description:
Steps:

  1. Make an Instagram reel of our products and share it on the Instagram page.
  2. Send the video link via email to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.
  3. You will receive a coupon code for the free plant in your email within 24 hours.
  4. Use the coupon at your checkout and avail yourself of the offer.
  5. This coupon can not be clubbed with any other coupon.
